name: cart-recovery
description: Cart abandonment recovery - WhatsApp + Email sequences

scripts.deploy: gcloud functions deploy cart-recovery --runtime nodejs20 --trigger-http --allow-unauthenticated --region me-west1 --memory 256MB --timeout 60s --set-env-vars GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT=$GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT,BASE_URL=$BASE_URL,WHATSAPP_API_TOKEN=$WHATSAPP_API_TOKEN,WHATSAPP_PHONE_ID=$WHATSAPP_PHONE_ID
